profile: James is a 45-year-old warehouse supervisor working the evening shift (2 PM - 10 PM) at a distribution center. He's been in this role for 15 years and is on his feet most of the day, walking between storage areas and loading docks. James wakes up around 10 AM, has a late breakfast, and goes to the gym for 30 minutes before work. He's trying to lose weight and monitors his activity with a fitness tracker. After work, he unwinds by watching TV or playing video games until 1-2 AM, which disrupts his sleep schedule. James has limited social interaction during the week due to his shift, but bowls in a league on Sunday mornings and has dinner with his brother's family once a week. He struggles with maintaining a healthy diet, often eating fast food during his work break.

scenes.description:
Alright it's 9 AM I should get going to bowling.

I'm meeting the guys at 10 AM.

Hopefully I don't sleep in.

Okay I'm out the door now.

Hey Mike! How's it going?

Not bad James you?

I'm good just trying to get some breakfast before we bowl.

You know I'm gonna crush you guys today.

Oh yeah? I'm looking forward to it then.

See you at the lanes!

messages.content: Hey Mike! How's it going?
Not bad James you?
I'm good just trying to get some breakfast before we bowl.
You know I'm gonna crush you guys today.
Oh yeah? I'm looking forward to it then.
See you at the lanes!

scenes.description:
I'm clocking in for my shift.
Just got my uniform on.
Hey Joe what's the plan for tonight?
We're short-staffed so I'm not sure yet.
Alright well let me know when you find out.
I'm gonna go grab a snack before we get started.
Where's the break room?
Third door on your left.
Thanks man.
Ugh I could really use a salad or something healthy but I think I'm gonna grab a burger from the food truck instead.
Yeah I know I know it's not the best choice but it's easy.
Maybe I'll try to sneak in a walk during my break to make up for it.

scenes.description:
I'm heading home from work now.

                  Traffic is pretty bad.

                  I'm gonna grab some dinner on the way.

                  Probably just get a burger or something.

                  Hey Samantha how was your day?

                  It was good just got a lot of work done.

                  That's great I'm glad to hear it.

                  We're watching a game tonight you wanna come over?

                  Yeah sure that sounds like fun.

                  What time were you thinking?

                  How about 9 o'clock?

                  Sounds perfect I'll see you then.

It was good just got a lot of work done
That's great I'm glad to hear it. We're watching a game tonight you wanna come over?
Yeah sure that sounds like fun
What time were you thinking?
How about 9 o'clock?
Sounds perfect I'll see you then
Hey bro, just got out of work. Traffic is a nightmare. Think I'll grab a burger on the way home

scenes.description:
I'm heading to my brother's place for dinner.
Should be around 6:30 PM.
His kid's been wanting to play with Legos.
Hopefully dinner's not too late.
I'm starving after that shift today.
Hey bro what's up?
Not much just getting the kids ready.
Alright I'm almost there.
Can I bring something?
No just bring yourself.
Sounds good to me.
See you soon.

I'm gonna make some pancakes.

Morning James.

That sounds like fun.

Just grocery shopping and stuff.

Okay sounds good.

I'll help with the dishes.

Thanks!
